observations: Overall shape and proportions match Figma: dark rounded container with heading area, progress bar + nav arrows, and 3 visible card slides with partial 4th peeking
Major elements in correct positions: heading left, description right, controls row between header and cards, cards in a horizontal carousel
Visual weight and density appropriate: dark background with accent-colored cards, white heading text, muted description text
No content overflow or clipping issues observed
Interactive elements (nav arrows, progress bar) visible and properly positioned

issues.visualEvidence: In the 1440px implementation screenshot, student names ('Emily Rodriguez, Alumni', 'Jordan Williams, Current Student') appear noticeably smaller and less prominent than in the Figma design where 'Student Name' dominates the top of each card with large bold lettering. The name is roughly the same visual size as the program subtitle, whereas in Figma the name is clearly larger.
issues.recommendation: Change from text-header-5 to text-header-3 (30px at desktop, still 10px short) or use a custom size text-[2.5rem] to achieve 40px. The most accurate fix would be a custom size since no theme heading token matches 40px exactly.

fix.verification: Card student name should appear at 40px (2.5rem) on desktop and 24px (1.5rem) on mobile, matching Figma's prominent heading style

issues.visualEvidence: Program name text is slightly smaller than in Figma. At 20px vs 24px, the program subtitle appears slightly less prominent. Difference is subtle but observable when comparing side-by-side.
issues.recommendation: Change from text-header-6 to text-header-5 (24px at desktop) for the program name. This matches the Figma value exactly.

fix.verification: Program name should appear at 24px on desktop, matching Figma's font/size/xl

passedChecks.observation: Dark rounded container (before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl) with correct padding, heading in two-column layout matching Figma composition
3 slides visible at desktop with partial 4th card peeking from right edge, matching Figma's carousel preview exactly
Uses bg-accent system which adapts to theme color context. Spec confirms: 'the green/purple/etc is the accent color.' Figma's teal (#b2eae7) is just one color variant example
Green-to-blue gradient fill on progress bar matches Figma's linear-gradient from neon-green to blue
Round buttons (~40px) with left/right arrow SVGs positioned to the right of the progress bar, matching Figma placement
Right-side fade gradient visible at initial state (carousel at beginning), using charcoal-to-transparent gradient. Left fade hidden at initial state. Responsive widths (60px/90px/120px) implemented
Anton font at text-header-2 size, white text on dark background. Visually prominent and proportionally correct against Figma's H4 heading style
Body text in white, positioned in the right column of the header area, matching Figma's two-column heading layout
Italic medium-weight body text at 16px, matching Figma's Roboto Medium Italic at font/size/base
Uppercase Roboto Medium at 16px with right-pointing chevron arrow, matching Figma's button style
Cards use p-6 (24px) matching Figma's margin/margin-2 = 24px padding
gap-6 (24px) between card elements matches Figma's gap/gap-4 = 24px
Swiper spaceBetween: 24 provides 24px gap between cards
rounded-3xl (24px) closely matches Figma's 25px radius -- within 1px, acceptable under relaxed tolerance
WATCH THE VIDEO button anchored to the bottom of cards via flex-col with flex-1 on content area, matching Figma's bottom-aligned button positioning
Mobile (375px): 1 card visible, stacked naturally. Tablet (768px): 2 cards visible. Desktop (1024/1440px): 3 cards with partial 4th. All breakpoints render correctly

designChecklist.notes: Typography fails for card student name (40px vs 24px) and program name (24px vs 20px). All other checks pass.

output.summary: The TestimonialsCarousel block has correct overall composition, layout, and interactive behavior matching the Figma design. Two typography issues found on the testimonial cards: the student name heading is significantly too small (24px vs Figma's 40px), and the program name is slightly too small (20px vs 24px). Both are caused by theme heading token mappings that don't align with the Figma heading hierarchy values for this component.
